page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Computation of joint statistics over sets of GWAS results
page_metadata.biotools__summary: software package that handles the computation of the joint statistics over sets of selected GWAS results, and the interactive exploration of the results through a web interface.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: software package that handles the computation of the joint statistics over sets of selected GWAS results, and the interactive exploration of the results through a web interface.
